<?php /** * Pre-transform that changes deprecated name attribute to ID if necessary */ class HTMLPurifier_AttrTransform_Name extends HTMLPurifier_AttrTransform { /** * @param array $attr * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @param HTMLPurifier_Context $context * @return array */ public function transform($attr, $config, $context) { // Abort early if we're using relaxed definition of name if ($config->get('HTML.Attr.Name.UseCDATA')) { return $attr; } if (!isset($attr['name'])) { return $attr; } $id = $this->confiscateAttr($attr, 'name'); if (isset($attr['id'])) { return $attr; } $attr['id'] = $id; return $attr; } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
